metadata.description: Commands, agents, hooks, and skills for Python-based deep learning research workflows

plugins.name: dl-research-toolkit
plugins.description: Toolkit for deep learning researchers: TDD guides, code review agents, and planning commands

plugins.name: brainstorming-skills
plugins.description: Interactive brainstorming skills that guide collaborative idea exploration through structured dialogue — one question at a time, multiple approaches, incremental validation

plugins.name: paper-council-skill
plugins.description: Transform research papers and code repositories into high-quality reusable skills through multi-agent council deliberation with 3 specialist analysts, anonymized peer review, and chairman synthesis

plugins.name: continuous-learning-skill
plugins.description: Instinct-based learning system that observes sessions via hooks, creates atomic instincts with confidence scoring, and evolves them into skills/commands/agents
